# Gym / Fitness Centre — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P2-gym-fitness-membership
**Vertical slug:** gym
**Research date:** 2026-04-25
**Agent:** replit-agent-2026-04-25-session-C

## 1. Nigerian Market Context
Nigerian fitness industry is growing rapidly (Lagos, Abuja, PH leading). Estimated 2,000+ registered gyms. Market split: premium corporate gyms (₦15,000–₦50,000/month, Lagos Island/Victoria Island) and community gyms (₦5,000–₦15,000/month, mainland and secondary cities). Class-based gyms (Zumba, aerobics, kickboxing, yoga) are popular among Nigerian women 25-45. Nigerian gym-goers expect: flexible monthly membership (no long-term contract), group classes included, WhatsApp reminders, and social proof via Instagram. Key pain for gym owners: membership churn; a website showing class timetables and WhatsApp contact helps retention and discovery.

## 2. Trust Signals
- Years of operation + member count ("500+ active members")
- CACRC registration (if formal business)
- Certified trainer credentials (ACSM, NASM, local fitness certifications)
- Before/after testimonials from Nigerian members
- WhatsApp for trial session booking — primary conversion path
- Instagram feed / photos of actual gym floor
- Class timetable — specific days/times builds credibility

## 3. Key CTAs
- Primary: "Book a Free Trial Session" (WhatsApp)
- Secondary: "View Membership Plans"

## 4. Content Localization
- Price in NGN: "Monthly membership from ₦8,000"
- Offer "pay per class" option — Nigerians prefer pay-as-you-go
- Nigerian class names: Aerobics, Zumba, Spinning, Power Yoga, Circuit Training, Kickboxing
- Mention Nigerian gym culture: "No judgment", "All fitness levels welcome"
- Peak hours: 6am–8am (before work), 5pm–8pm (after work)

## 5. Website Structure
- Home: hero + membership plans + class timetable + facilities + WhatsApp trial CTA
- About: trainer credentials + gym story + photos
- Services: all membership types + class descriptions
- Contact: WhatsApp trial booking + address + hours

## 6. Platform Invariants
- T4: all membership prices in kobo integers
- P2: NGN prices, WhatsApp CTA, Nigerian class names
- P4: mobile-first (gym goers check on phone)
- CSS namespace: .gm-
